message:
fix(web): enforce WCAG 2.5.5 touch targets on touch devices

Add comprehensive touch target compliance rules for touch devices
(phones, tablets) using `@media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse)`.

All interactive elements now meet 44x44px minimum touch target size:

- Buttons (all variants): min 44x44px with expanded padding
  - .btn, .btn-sm, .btn.compact, .btn-icon
- Interactive ARIA roles: [role="button"], [role="tab"], [role="menuitem"]
- Form inputs: text, search, number, checkbox, radio, select
- List items: min 56px height for comfortable tapping
- Badge buttons: when clickable or with role="button"
- Overlay/modal close buttons: explicit 44x44px
- View mode segments: consistent touch sizing
- Links: a[href] minimum sizing

Also ensures adequate spacing between adjacent targets:
- badge-row gap: 8px
- toolbar gap: 8px
- btn + btn margin: 4px

This improves accessibility on mobile devices and meets WCAG 2.5.5
Level AAA requirements for target size.

Implements: phage_explorer-1cwn
